meta.transcript_preview: In a city where time decides your worth. He leaves early, he drives fast. He knows exactly where he's going. I'm...m...lost. He trusts his instincts. Recalculating. Recalculating. This doesn't look right. It's a shortcut. Where are you? Almost there. No, you're not. At this point, turning back would feel like failure. Finally, I'm here. I'm...lost. This was not the first time. Or are you? I'm...st
meta.review_title: Zoro's Lost Journey: A City Driver's Guide
meta.review_script: In a city where time decides your worth... He leaves early, drives fast. Trusts his instincts and recalculates. Finally found the right path. Subscribe for more adventures!
